title: ageratina dasyneura
intro: Ageratina dasyneura, also known as false dragon's head, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ageratina dasyneura include relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ageratina dasyneura is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
